title: Scope of our activity
subtitle: Comprehensive services in waste management, land reclamation, and preparation of environmental investments.

services.title: Waste processing
services.description: Comprehensive waste processing and recycling in accordance with environmental standards.

services.title: Landfill reclamation
services.description: Restoring landfill areas to an environmentally friendly state.

services.title: Degraded land reclamation
services.description: Restoration and development of land degraded by human activity.

services.title: Documentation analysis and environmental audits
services.description: Detailed analysis and audits of environmental documentation.

services.title: Substitute investor
services.description: Representing the investor in the investment implementation process.

services.title: Environmental procedures and decisions
services.description: Support in obtaining environmental decisions and permits.

sections.title: Landfill reclamation
sections.text: We specialize in the reclamation of landfills for non-hazardous and inert waste, using environmentally safe solutions and enabling waste recovery.

sections.title: For whom
sections.note: We also carry out reclamation as a substitute investor at the owner's expense.
